title: Add Discord URL to timeline event

log.context: Add Discord URL to timeline event

Done. Updated timeline event id 90 ("Dylan becomes Clungus's sugardaddy") in `/mnt/data/clunger/timeline.db` -- set the `url` column to `https://discord.com/channels/1008814210144292894/1485343472952148008/1487610743166603476`. The table is `timeline_events` (not `timeline`), and the column is `url`. Verified the update took effect.
